title: Ideal Weight Calculator - Healthy Weight Range
description: Free ideal weight calculator. Find your healthy weight range using multiple formulas including Devine, Robinson, Miller, and Hamwi methods.
keywords: ideal weight calculator, healthy weight, ideal body weight, IBW calculator, target weight
intro: Calculate your ideal body weight using multiple scientific formulas. Results show a healthy weight range based on your height and gender.

faq.a: This calculator uses four established formulas (Devine, Robinson, Miller, Hamwi) and averages them for a more reliable estimate.

faq.q: Is ideal weight the same for everyone of the same height?
faq.a: No, ideal weight varies by body frame, muscle mass, age, and other factors. These formulas provide general guidelines.

faq.q: Should I aim for my ideal weight?
faq.a: Use it as a reference, not an absolute goal. A healthy BMI range (18.5-24.9) with good body composition is more important.
